nasb.text: Your oils have a pleasing fragrance, Your name is like purified oil; Therefore the maidens love you.

esv.text: your anointing oils are fragrant; your name is oil poured out; therefore virgins love you.

cnv.text: 你的膏油香氣芬芳； 你的名字如同倒出來的膏油； 所以眾童女都愛你。

ccb.text: 你的美名如此芬芳， 如同倒出来的香膏， 难怪少女们都爱慕你。
